positive: Minimalist vector graphic design of a stylized, joyful sun and crescent moon interconnected by flowing geometric vines. The sun should radiate warm gold and bright orange geometric lines, while the moon is a calming cyan gradient. The overall composition must be symmetrical, centered, and suitable for screen printing on fabric. Clean lines, high contrast black outline work, flat design style, vibrant yet restrained color palette, isolated on a white background, clean silhouette style, tattoo flash art aesthetic. Perfect for t-shirt printing.
